mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, subject_id, branch, total_attempted, correct_count, incorrect_count, last_studied_at, created_at, updated_at FROM user_statistics ORDER BY id
SELECT id, user_id, subject_id, branch, total_attempted, correct_count, incorrect_count, last_studied_at, created_at, updated_at FROM user_statistics WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_statistics (user_id, subject_id, branch, total_attempted, correct_count, incorrect_count, last_studied_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{subjectId}, #{branch}, #{totalAttempted}, #{correctCount}, #{incorrectCount}, #{lastStudiedAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE user_statistics SET user_id = #{userId}, subject_id = #{subjectId}, branch = #{branch}, total_attempted = #{totalAttempted}, correct_count = #{correctCount}, incorrect_count = #{incorrectCount}, last_studied_at = #{lastStudiedAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
